Based on my visual inspection of the molecule, I have identified all neighbour atoms of atom index 9 (C).

## Results

**Atom of interest:** Index 9, Element: C (Carbon)

**Neighbour atoms (covalently connected to atom 9):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 10 | C (Carbon) |
| 8 | C (Carbon) |
| 20 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 9819

The atom C:9 is part of an aromatic ring system and forms covalent bonds with two carbon atoms (C:10 and C:8) and one hydrogen atom (H:20). The atom C:8 is further connected to a chlorine atom (Cl:21).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 9, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
